valid_meta.principle: For preset switches, preserve customized components unless the user explicitly chooses overwrite.
Use shadcn project context and docs before composing installed primitives; verify with real checks.
Repair dependency cycles by moving abstractions inward and concrete framework or storage implementations outward, then verify imports rather than relying on naming conventions.
Integrate web changes from measured performance, accessibility, and browser-behavior evidence, separating supported improvements from release-blocking regressions.
When repairing a proposed SQL optimization, preserve semantics first and use plan/test feedback to distinguish real optimizer help from changes that merely look faster.
Build complete Python MCP servers by matching transport to the client, using uv plus FastMCP, typed schemas, bounded access, and concrete verification.
